meaning: n.镶边,皮毛衬里,[总称][建]钉板条
examples: The original wall furring was removed to reveal the structure.
Oxidized cholesterol may be responsible for furring up the arteries.
Also analyzed the influence of temperature and furring on the heat pump system.
"Bad" cholesterol - low density lipoproteins (LDL) - contribute to furring of the arteries.
